data.title: Gasoline prices surge with a 20-cent increase per gallon this week in the US. Diesel rates hit an all-time high, last seen in April 2024.
data.description: This week saw a significant increase in gas prices, with a gallon of regular gasoline spiking by over 20 cents. Additionally, diesel prices surged to their highest point since April 2024.

data.title: Two CFX projects in Florida receive ACEC 2026 Engineering Excellence Awards for capacity improvements with Flex Lanes technology.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Orlando, two projects by the Central Florida Expressway Authority (CFX) utilizing Flex Lanes technology received recognition from the American Council of Engineering Companies of Florida (ACEC-FL) through the Florida Engineering Excellence Awards. This acknowledgment highlights the success and innovation of the CFX capacity improvements projects.

data.title: Kelsey H. Collins, PhD, wins 2026 NEXT Award for research on fat's role in osteoarthritis; $100k prize.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in New Orleans, Kelsey H. Collins, PhD, received the 2026 New Emerging eXperts in Translational Science (NEXT) Award for her study on the significance of fat tissue in osteoarthritis (OA) development. OA, traditionally seen as a result of aging and mechanical stress, was reevaluated by Collins, shedding light on how fat tissue plays a crucial part in the disease.

data.title: Quest Nutrition partners with Sophie Cunningham, debuts new products Stacks Protein Bar & Crispy Protein Chips in The Grand Try series.
data.description: In an event held in El Segundo, California on March 4, 2026, Cunningham led The Grand Try series featuring USA Rugby athletes and unveiled Quest's latest products - Stacks Bars and Crispy Protein Chips. Quest Nutrition collaborated with a professional basketball player for this initiative.

data.title: Jonathan Heckmann appointed as President of Texas market expansion for American Elevator Company, part of ESI family.
data.description: In Dallas on March 4, 2026, the American Elevator Company, a branch of Elevator Service, Inc. (ESI), disclosed the selection of Jonathan Heckmann, MBA, as the President to spearhead their expansion into the Texas market. This move aligns with the company's growth strategy and aims to capitalize on the opportunities in the region.

data.title: Apple introduces affordable MacBook Neo to expand beyond premium products, but stock price drops.
data.description: In a strategic shift to broaden its product offerings, tech giant Apple has launched the affordable MacBook Neo, a budget-friendly notebook computer. This move marks the company's expansion beyond its traditional focus on premium products. Despite the introduction of the MacBook Neo, Apple's stock experienced a decline following the announcement. This development signals Apple's entry into the budget notebook PC market, catering to a wider range of consumers seeking more affordable tech options.

data.title: US strikes Iranian Navy, Israel boosts defense budget. Lockheed Martin wins $1.9B contract. ARK increases stock holdings.
data.description: The campaign against Iran is ongoing with significant advancements. Lockheed Martin secures a lucrative contract worth $1.9 billion. ARK increases its stock holdings in the company. In related news, the U.S. reports a successful operation against the Iranian Navy, prompting Israel to increase its defense budget. Additionally, ARK makes strategic adjustments to its portfolio holdings.

data.title: Dycom, a data center supplier, exceeded earnings expectations due to fiber optic cable demand. Shares dropped despite the positive results.
data.description: Dycom, a supplier of data centers, is transitioning its focus from telecom services to providing support for AI data centers. Despite a strong earnings call, the company's shares experienced a decline. The shift in emphasis comes as demand for fiber optic cables rises. The post highlights Dycom's surpassing of earnings expectations due to this demand, but also mentions the drop in share value following the announcement.

data.title: Moderna stock surged after reaching $950 million settlement in Covid vaccine patent dispute with Arbutus Biopharma and Roivant.
data.description: Moderna recently resolved a lengthy patent dispute with Arbutus Biopharma and Roivant. Following this settlement agreement, Moderna's stock surged on Wednesday. The settlement amount reached was a substantial $950 million in relation to their Covid vaccine. This positive development led to a significant boost in Moderna's stock value, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Johnny Huard, PhD, is awarded the Arnold I. Caplan Award for Distinguished Research in Orthobiologics by AAOS.
data.description: In New Orleans on March 4, 2026, the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons revealed that Johnny Huard, PhD, was awarded the Arnold I. Caplan Award for Distinguished Research in Orthobiologics (Caplan Award). This accolade celebrates the impactful research in this field by honoring Dr. Huard's contributions.
